problem_statement: The platform has governed symbols, claims, contradictions, and memory admission, but it needs a bounded local proof module that tests recursive WH-driven symbol inquiry, metadata promotion, provenance, unknown generation, contradiction recording, and settlement without granting execution authority.
success_criteria: SNet generates the full bounded WH inquiry tick for a symbol deterministically
metadata promotion requires an explicit score and preserves parent context
unknown answers produce unknown records and are not promoted into trusted symbols
contextual contradictions are recorded instead of deleting or flattening claims
recursive expansion stops at the configured depth budget
a read-only operator projection exposes bounded counts and receipt evidence without raw answers or execution, connector, route, or filesystem authority
the SNet mesh receipt validates against a repository-local JSON schema and rejects raw-answer or authority mutations
invalid zero-question budgets, duplicate WH answer keys, and empty explicit answers fail closed with explicit errors
Mfidel sequences are preserved exactly as atomic symbol text across answer, metadata, and promoted-symbol paths
SNet mesh receipts include a content-sensitive digest so different same-count meshes do not share receipt identity
answers outside the active WH budget, depth-limited ticks, or duplicate ticks fail closed instead of being silently discarded
SNet mesh receipt evidence references include the mesh digest witness
invalid confidence, invalid validation state, and malformed answer maps fail before WH tick mutation
non-string text inputs, empty score fields, and non-integer read-model bounds fail with explicit errors
case-distinct raw answers remain separate evidence records instead of silently overwriting each other
answer evidence references reject malformed tuple input before answer mutation
the MCOI runtime exposes a bounded read-only SNet operator route without accepting raw answers or granting execution, connector, route, filesystem, gateway, or terminal-closure authority
non_goals: no replacement of existing WHQR policy evaluation
no trusted knowledge promotion without evidence
constraints: SNet must remain a Foundation Mode proof module with only bounded read-only MCOI route exposure
all generated records must be deterministic and auditable
all error paths must fail closed with explicit reasons
Mfidel atomicity must not be violated by Unicode normalization, decomposition, recomposition, or root-letter modeling
gateway, connector, filesystem, execution, and terminal-closure integration remain AwaitingEvidence until separate focused witnesses authorize those boundaries
acceptance_tests: python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; from scripts.validate_sdlc_artifact import validate_artifact_record; payload=json.loads(Path('examples/sdlc/requirement_snet_rsim_01_20260613.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); errors=validate_artifact_record('requirement', payload); assert not errors, errors"
evidence_required: SNet mesh receipt schema validation receipt
SNet SDLC requirement schema validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
SNet route test receipt proving read-only bounded operator exposure
future design decision receipt before gateway, connector, filesystem, execution, or terminal-closure integration
future security review receipt before any execution-adjacent use
